creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
After change to the new usb stack (usb2) on my i386 current machine, my keyboard
stops working, i've tried a patch and change some sysctls but everything without
success.

More details could be found on this thread:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2008-December/001559.html
